data.description: Data to summarize. For traces: {trace, hierarchy}. For events: {event}. Not required when using trace_id or generation_id.

date_from.description: Start of date range for ID-based lookup (e.g. '-7d' or '2026-01-01'). Defaults to -30d.

date_to.description: End of date range for ID-based lookup. Defaults to now.

generation_id.description: Generation event UUID to summarize. The backend fetches the event data automatically. Requires date_from for efficient lookup.

mode.description:
Summary detail level: 'minimal' for 3-5 points, 'detailed' for 5-10 points

* `minimal` - minimal
* `detailed` - detailed

model.description: LLM model to use (defaults based on provider)

summarize_type.description:
Type of entity to summarize. Inferred automatically when using trace_id or generation_id.

* `trace` - trace
* `event` - event

trace_id.description: Trace ID to summarize. The backend fetches the trace data automatically. Requires date_from for efficient lookup.
